title: BitGo offers Europe’s crypto firms a MiCA-compliance lifeline as license deadline looms
summary: BaFin-regulated BitGo says its Crypto-as-a-Service platform can help eligible crypto players across Europe with an alternative way to navigate MiCA.

title: Forget the price charts. Here's how bitcoin and S&P 500 look like when adjusted for the money printer
summary: Valuations shaped by M2 money supply growth paint reveal concerning trends for risk assets.

title: Crypto PAC's $12 million Senate candidate, Barry Moore, wins Alabama GOP primary
summary: The Trump loyalist drew more crypto dollars than any candidate so far in this year's midterms, and the result marks a big win for the industry's political arm.

title: Live markets: Markets turn their focus to the Fed as oil returns to pre-war levels
summary: Bitcoin's Sharpe ratio hit a level that has marked every cycle low since 2015, but in each case it preceded months of basing rather than an immediate rebound.

title: XRP gives back breakout gains, slipping below $1.23 on heavy selling
summary: XRP briefly traded above key resistance before sellers stepped in, with rising volume suggesting traders used the rally to cut positions rather than add risk.
